name: buselligence
description: Open-source AI runtime — build, run, and extend AI-powered applications.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix client && npm run build --prefix server && npm run build --prefix cli
scripts.setup: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix cli && npm run db:migrate --prefix server && npm run db:seed --prefix server
